1.premise: Describing house-sitting responsibilities makes Hinge sound like a legitimate housing app.
A cat eating only your underwear reveals a yeast infection by proxy.

2.premise: Taken literally, 'puss' means both cat and vagina, letting both senses apply simultaneously.

lines.text: I don't know if y'all can tell by looking at me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I don't have a house.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I am actually living through this app I found
lines.label: setup

lines.text: where I find strangers who choose me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to stay at their place, water their plants,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No, but I do go from house to house
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and it usually goes pretty well.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But one time I was taking care of this cat
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and when I came home I discovered that the cat
lines.label: setup

lines.text: had gotten into my dirty laundry
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and chewed up only my underwear.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So weird way to find out you have a yeast infection.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: - Yeah, you can take the puss out of the panties,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: but you can't take the panties out of the puss.
lines.label: tag
